db.description: Runs a local Postgres database for development

clean.description: Cleans all local-only files relating to the Zitadel platform (API, Login and Management Console)

pack.description: Creates package archives for the API across all platforms and for the Login component, then generates a checksums.txt file containing the SHA256 checksums for all created archives.

ci.description: Reproduces the lint_test_build CI job locally. Phase 1: lint + unit-test + build (no Docker). Phase 2: integration tests (needs Docker).

commands: pnpm nx affected --nxBail --targets lint test build --exclude @zitadel/docs

ci-compose.description: Reproduces the compose_smoke_test CI job locally. Builds images, starts the stack, runs smoke tests and Playwright, then tears down.
